generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you hear about the 2024 data breach that exposed critical infrastructure vulnerabilities? Experts warn that without stronger strategic autonomy, we're leaving our national security in the hands of foreign entities. The 2024 breach showed that relying on foreign tech puts us at risk. It's time to prioritize domestic solutions and reduce our dependence on unreliable allies. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
